title: Overheads
intro: Add your business costs — rent, rates, insurance, IT, phones, utilities, whatever applies. A cost borne by one branch is 100% that site; a shared cost (e.g. group insurance) is split. Percentages must total 100%.
emptySite: No overheads allocated to this site yet.
name: Name
vatRateHint: Free entry: 20 standard, 5 for some utilities, 0 for VAT-exempt (e.g. Council Tax). Pre-filled from your company default.
allocationHint: Split this cost across the sites that bear it. Must total 100%.
